matrix_description: Phase B intermediate verification matrix. BASELINE + C1 LLM-assisted Class 1 cell, 3 trials each. ~1 minute total on M1 with real Ollama. Used between matrix_smoke (1 trial) and full matrix_v1 (12 cells × 30 trials) to surface Class 1 multi-trial / multi-cell bugs without paying the Class 2 caregiver-timeout cost. Class 2 cells exercised by matrix_v1.

cells.description: Class 1 intent recovery via LLM-assisted candidate generation.

anchor_commits._purpose: Filled in by the orchestrator at sweep start.
